typography.header_font_style: Bold Semi-Serif (Ming/Song Style) / Heavy Sans-Serif Hybrid
text_effects: Extra-large scale vertical typography (East Asian style)
Mixed horizontal and vertical text blocks
Dynamic kerning: Standard for headers, compressed for vertical blocks

compositional_rules.spacing: Balanced tension between dense graphic center and airy margins
compositional_rules.depth: Pseudo-3D through converging lines and forced perspective (Archway)
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Dominant vertical type-anchor on the right, centered symbolic focus
compositional_rules.alignment: Right-aligned vertical headers, top-left justified English accents, bottom-left sub-metadata
